title: aspidium dissectum
intro: Aspidium dissectum, also known as Lady fern, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Osmundaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and astringent properties. The health benefits of Aspidium dissectum include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate menstrual cramps, and treat respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. Aspidium dissectum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
